editorial_overview: No relevant European news articles from the last week could be reliably identified in the provided search results. The results supplied were largely unrelated, non-news, or did not clearly match the requested themes of social-media deletion, controversial political speech online, censorship, moderation disputes, or court/regulatory takedown orders. Because the instruction was to report only what was found and not invent or paraphrase sources, no articles are listed.
topic: Europe news on deletion, moderation, censorship, and removal of political speech online
